LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD, P.E.'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF PROPOSITION 65. WRITTEN ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT.JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD, P.E.'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements of Proposition 65. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
